text: Some scientists believe there may be life on Europa, but no evidence has been confirmed.
It is unclear whether dark matter consists of WIMPs or axions.
The exact cause of the extinction of the dinosaurs is still debated among paleontologists.
Some researchers estimate global temperatures will rise by 2-4°C by 2100.
The origins of the universe remain one of the greatest mysteries in cosmology.
According to unverified reports, a new treatment shows promise for Alzheimer's disease.
Many experts agree that AI will transform the economy, though the extent is debated.
The ancient city of Atlantis, if it existed, has never been found.
It is theoretically possible to travel faster than light using wormholes, but this remains speculative.
The author of this anonymous poem is believed to be from the 14th century, but this is uncertain.
